query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM line_receipts WHERE status = 'on_hold';
SELECT SUBSTRING(reviewNote, 1, 60) as note_prefix, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM line_receipts WHERE status = 'on_hold' GROUP BY note_prefix ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 15;
